rule.name: burp suite scanner and burp collaborator detected via proxy
rule.description: Burp Suite Scanner Activirt Detected via Proxy  License: https://github.com/Neo23x0/sigma/blob/master/LICENSE.Detection.Rules.md.
rule.query:
rule burp_suite_scanner_and_burp_collaborator_detected_via_proxy {
 meta:
    author = "Emir Erdogan"
    description = "Burp Suite Scanner Activirt Detected via Proxy  License: https://github.com/Neo23x0/sigma/blob/master/LICENSE.Detection.Rules.md."
    reference = "https://tdm.socprime.com/tdm/info/QhIyqc5Qdl6m"
    version = "0.01"
    created = "2021-03-09"
    category = "proxy"
    mitre = "T1190, T1210"

  events:
re.regex($selection.target.url, `.*burpcollaborator.*`)

  condition:
    $selection
}
